description: The app streams media files (camera streams, doorbell videos, audio) from the Home Assistant server via ExoPlayer, using the Bearer Token for authenticated access.

flow_steps.code: fun onExoPlayerFullscreenChanged(isFullScreen: Boolean) { updateState { it.copy(exoPlayerState = it.exoPlayerState?.copy(isFullScreen = isFullScreen)) } }
flow_steps.details: The frontend WebView requests media playback via external bus message, creating an ExoPlayer instance.

flow_steps.code: fun buildMediaSource(url: String): MediaSource { ... addHeader("Authorization", buildBearerToken()) }
flow_steps.details: Media content is fetched from the Home Assistant server via HTTP with Bearer Token authentication added to requests.
